# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud database security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-appdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login name
    minLength: 1
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login password
    minLength: 12
  aadAdminObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the Azure AD admin user or group
  aadAdminLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Azure AD admin login name (user or group display name)
  allowedDevIpStart:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Start IP address for allowed development range
  allowedDevIpEnd:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: End IP address for allowed development range
  allowedDevIp2Start:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Optional second dev IP range start
  allowedDevIp2End:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Optional second dev IP range end
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging
    allowedValues:
      - staging
      - development
      - production
    metadata:
      description: Deployment environment
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
variables:
  databaseEdition: Standard
  databaseServiceObjective: S1
  databaseMaxSizeBytes: 2147483648
  auditStorageAccountName: "[concat('sqlaudit', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  deploySecondDevRule: "[and(not(empty(parameters('allowedDevIp2Start'))), not(empty(parameters('allowedDevIp2End'))))]"
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2021-09-01"
    name: "[variables('auditStorageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: sql-auditing

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      administrators:
        administratorType: ActiveDirectory
        principalType: Group
        login: "[parameters('aadAdminLogin')]"
        sid: "[parameters('aadAdminObjectId')]"
        tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
        azureADOnlyAuthentication: false

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    sku:
      name: "[variables('databaseServiceObjective')]"
      tier: "[variables('databaseEdition')]"
    properties:
      maxSizeBytes: "[variables('databaseMaxSizeBytes')]"
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      catalogCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowDevTeamRange1')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('allowedDevIpStart')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('allowedDevIpEnd')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowDevTeamRange2')]"
    condition: "[variables('deploySecondDevRule')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('allowedDevIp2Start')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('allowedDevIp2End')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      storageEndpoint: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName')), '2021-09-01').keys[0].value]"
      retentionDays: 90
      auditActionsAndGroups:
        - SUCCESSFUL_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - FAILED_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - BATCH_COMPLETED_GROUP
        - DATABASE_OBJECT_CHANGE_GROUP
        - DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_CHANGE_GROUP
        - SCHEMA_OBJECT_CHANGE_GROUP
      isStorageSecondaryKeyInUse: false
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/Default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings', parameters('sqlServerName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      retentionDays: 90

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/vulnerabilityAssessments
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies', parameters('sqlServerName'), 'Default')]"
    properties:
      storageContainerPath: "[concat(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob, 'vulnerability-assessment')]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName')), '2021-09-01').keys[0].value]"
      recurringScans:
        isEnabled: true
        emailSubscriptionAdmins: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Redirect

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    properties:
      retentionDays: 14
      diffBackupIntervalInHours: 12

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
  auditStorageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('auditStorageAccountName')]"
